label: Debug
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Enable debug mode to connect to the Windows software and disable it for troubleshooting the software to ensure normal operation.

label: Offset_Stop
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: Offset_Mode
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Based_On
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: _1CF_Delay_Emg
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: _1CF_Delay_Level
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: Num Of Stops
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: Travel Time
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: The maximum allowed time for the elevator to remain in motion after detecting the distance sensor is exceeded, if it remains in motion beyond the set time, a distance error occurs and the elevator stops forcibly.

label: Level_time
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: The maximum allowed time for the elevator to move after passing the floor sensor, if it remains in motion beyond the set time, an error occurs and the elevator stops with a forced stop. To clear the error, a hardware restart is required.

label: QCmode
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Activating QC mode: This mode is only used by the manufacturer on the simulator. Make sure it is disabled for public use.

label: End D Time
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: If an error occurs after several open and close attempts and does not repeat, and if the number of consecutive errors exceeds the set value, the error will be retained and the buttons will be reset once.

label: Ura_Timeout
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: If the URA does not close within the set time, an error is logged and the door is reopened and closed again.

label: BaseMent
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: prog_Mode
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Set the main mode for service settings. If set to auto, the board automatically configures settings according to the specified type. In Custom mode, service can be configured separately for each floor.

label: Service_Type
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Set the type of elevator service for all floors

label: Door_Select
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: If the floors have more than one door and each door has a separate control panel, set it to "en".

label: Park Time
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: 69 Debounce
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: Setting hardware debounce for input 110 volts number 69; debounce means the initial instability of the connection. To eliminate these mechanical noises at the hardware level.

label: 68 Debounce
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: Setting hardware debounce for input 110 volts number 68; debounce means initial connection instability. To eliminate these mechanical noises at the hardware level.

label: Close Timeout
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: The maximum time for completing the closure and completion of inputs 68, 69, and 66, if the door is not closed after the set time, an error is recorded and the door is reopened and closed again.

label: Open Time
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: Set the door opening duration considering that the board does not have feedback on the complete opening of the door, adjust this parameter after measurement.

label: Control Type
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Adjust the feedback mechanism for the door being open or closed

label: NumOfDoor
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Adjust the number of cabin doors

label: Talk Volume
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: Music Volume
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: Gang Select
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Welcome Floor
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Fire_Floor
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Park_Floor
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Wating_Floor
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: Time To Park
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: Emergency_Dir
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Type_Elevator
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: The choice of elevator type directly affects all settings and the operation of the board.

label: El_Speed
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: The elevator speed must be adjusted to match the actual speed of the motor.

label: relay_off_delay
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: Standby_Time
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: Set the time to enter standby mode after the specified duration, and the board will enter low power mode. The segments use the settings related to this mode and dim, and the cabin light also turns off.

label: _1CF_Delay_All
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: Create a delay on 1cf inputs for all classes

label: TC_ReleaseDel
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: UDReleaseDel
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: PB_Debunce
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: Setting debounce time on cabin and floor chassis: If there is noise on the chassis, the effect of the noise can be eliminated by increasing the debounce time.

label: dublex_pb_type
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Motor_Pol
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Motor direction setting, if needed, this setting can be used to change the motor direction.

label: Enc_Pol
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Adjust the direction of the encoder pulses (inputs a and b). In case of an encoder reversal error, change this setting or reverse the hardware inputs a and b.

label: S/A_Learn_Sp
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: S/A_Rev_Sp
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: S/A_Max_Sp
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: S/A_Med_Sp
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: S/A_Slow_Sp
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: S/A_Level_Sp
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: S/A_Lowest_Sp
type: single setting with an integer input value

label: Par_Learn_SP
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Par_Rev_SP
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Par_Max_SP
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Par_Med_SP
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Par_Slow_SP
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Par_Level_SP
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list

label: Drive_Connection
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Setting the connection type of the board to the drive

label: BaudRate
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Configure RS485 serial connection rate

label: Format
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Set serial communication format

label: Phase_Errors
type: collection of settings where each setting has a label and selects one option from the same shared option list
description: Activating and deactivating errors related to phase and voltage control

label: Floor Setting
type: array of setting groups. Each group may contain integer input settings and single-option selection settings. The user first selects a group item and then edits the settings within that group

label: Phc_UnderV
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: The minimum safe voltage for device operation

label: Phc_OverV
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: The maximum voltage the device can withstand for proper operation

label: Under-V_Delay
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: During the voltage drop fault detection time, the fault will not be detected until the set duration has elapsed.

label: N-Line
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Setting whether the elevator is three-phase or single-phase

label: Mode
type: single setting where the user selects one option from a predefined list
description: Setting the operation mode of the board in a duplex network in group mode, the board set to master has movement priority and tries to provide more service.

label: OTF_time
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: In case of an elevator malfunction, the service exits duplex mode. This setting determines the duration after which it returns to duplex mode again.

label: TimeOut
type: single setting with an integer input value
description: The maximum time duration that if an elevator does not provide service due to specific issues, another elevator will take over. If this time is exceeded, the relevant warning is recorded, and the elevators exit group mode. After the specified time in time_otf, an attempt is made to return to group mode.

label: PB Setting
type: array of setting groups. Each group may contain integer input settings and single-option selection settings. The user first selects a group item and then edits the settings within that group

label: C Input
type: collection of settings where each setting has a label and selects one option from the same shared option list
description: Configuring inputs for programmable hardware / Each hardware input is connected to a software input. In case of a failure of one input, it can be configured to another hardware input.

label: C Input
type: collection of settings where each setting has a label and selects one option from the same shared option list
description: Configuring programmable hardware outputs / each hardware input is connected to a software output. In case of a failure of one output, it can be configured to another hardware input.

label: In Type
type: collection of settings where each setting has a label and selects one option from the same shared option list
description: Setting the input type: If set to NC, the hardware and software input connection will be direct. If set to NO, the software input will be the opposite of the hardware.

label: Out Type
type: collection of settings where each setting has a label and selects one option from the same shared option list
description: Setting the type of connection for hardware output and software output: if set to NC, the connection will be direct, and setting it to NO will cause it to be reversed.
